chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3963 of 2021 Syed Adnan Kafeel & another Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 11027/25 2. For orders on CMA 11028/25 3. For orders on CMA 18069/22 4. For hearing of CMA 18068/22 5. For hearing of CMA 25827/21 6. For hearing of main case. Dated: 30.05.2025 None for petitioners. Mr. Mujtaba Sohail Raja for respondent No.5 and proposed intervener. Ms. Humaira for Sindh Building Control Authority. -.-.- None is present for the petitioners. It is however stated by learned counsel appearing for respondent No.5 and proposed intervener that the petitioners have already made a complaint to SBCA under the relevant SOPs. Accordingly, the SBCA shall decide the same in accordance with the SOPs. A copy of this order shall be sent to D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Head of Const. Benches Judge
